src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Added 'scp' as a new supported endpoint type to the enumeration.
Removes the import for the deprecated Eureka client annotation to align with modern Spring Cloud versions.
Enables Spring's scheduling capabilities by adding the EnableScheduling annotation.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Added '@EnableScheduling' annotation to the main application class.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Activates the service discovery client functionality by uncommenting the EnableDiscoveryClient annotation.
Replace complex legacy Spring Batch configuration with a minimal setup using DefaultBatchConfiguration and SyncTaskExecutor.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Removed JobRepositoryFactoryBean, DataSourceTransactionManager, and custom thread pool wiring; added simple JobLauncher bean with SyncTaskExecutor.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Remove the custom CustomReader bean definition that was tightly coupled to specific job parameters and file paths.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Deleted the customReader bean method and associated imports for ObjectMapper, DataChunk, and EntityInfo.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Introduce a new bean to manage a set of job IDs, likely for tracking or state management in the new architecture.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Added a @Bean method returning a new HashSet<Long> named jobIds.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Added import for java.time.Duration to support new throughput calculation logic.
Removed unused URI scheme constants and legacy identifiers that are no longer needed in the refactored codebase.
Removed unused metadata and transfer option constants.
Renamed SOURCE_URI constant to SOURCE_HOST to better reflect its usage as a host identifier.
Added SOURCE_PORT constant to support explicit port configuration.
Added FILE_COUNT constant for tracking file metrics.
Added credential type constants for source and destination.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl:
+ public static final String SOURCE_CREDENTIAL_TYPE = "sourceCredentialType";
+ public static final String DEST_CREDENTIAL_TYPE = "destCredentialType";

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Renamed DEST_URI constant to DEST_HOST to align with SOURCE_HOST naming convention.
Added DEST_PORT constant to support explicit port configuration for destinations.
Corrected FIVE_MB constant to use proper binary calculation (5 * 1024 * 1024) instead of approximate decimal value.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl:
- public static final int FIVE_MB = 5000000;
+ public static final int FIVE_MB = 5 * 1024 * 1024;

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Added TWENTY_MB constant for larger chunk size configurations.
Added GOOGLE_DRIVE_MIN_BYTES constant for Google Drive API requirements.
Added HTTP header constants for range requests and CORS support.
Added SCP command string constants for remote file operations.
Added job and file size metric constants.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl:
+ public static final String JOB_SIZE = "jobSize";
+ public static final String FILE_SIZE_AVG = "fileSizeAvg";

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Added HTTP compression and encoding constants.
Added concurrency and parallelism configuration constants.
Added application and thread pool naming constants.
Added computeThroughput method to calculate data transfer speed in megabits per second using Duration.
Replaced Gson with Jackson ObjectMapper for JSON serialization and deserialization.
Replaced Spring AMQP MessageListener interface with RabbitListener annotation for message consumption.
Replaced Spring Batch JobLauncher with a generic JobLauncher interface or updated implementation.
Replaced CrudService with VfsExpander for handling VFS directory expansion.
Replaced manual thread pool management with ThreadPoolManager for concurrency control.
Replaced field-based dependency injection with constructor-based dependency injection.
Replaced static queue configuration with dynamic queue injection via Spring Expression Language.
Replaced System.out.println with SLF4J logger for message logging.
Replaced Gson deserialization with Jackson ObjectMapper deserialization.
Replaced CrudService insertBeforeTransfer with VfsExpander expandDirectory for VFS handling.
Replaced asyncJobLauncher with jobLauncher for job execution.
Replaced manual job ID tracking with Set<Long> jobIds injection.
Replaced manual thread pool configuration with ThreadPoolManager applyOptimizer.
Replaced generic Exception handling with specific JSON parsing error handling.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: catch (Exception e) { logger.debug("Failed to parse jsonStr: {} to TransferJobRequest.java", jsonStr); }

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Replaced error logging with info logging for failed parameter application.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: logger.info("Did not apply transfer params due to parsing message failure");

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Replace direct CrudService dependency with VfsExpander to handle directory expansion logic.
Rename asyncJobLauncher to jobLauncher for clearer naming conventions.
Add logic to expand VFS directories into file lists before processing the transfer request.
Remove verbose debug logging of sensitive credentials and internal paths, replacing with a single toString log.
Update job launch mechanism to capture JobExecution object for ID tracking instead of relying on request ID.
Introduce a Set<Long> field to track active job IDs via constructor injection.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Set<Long> jobIds; public TransferController(Set<Long> jobIds){ this.jobIds = jobIds; }

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Replaced PriorityQueue with ConcurrentLinkedQueue to support thread-safe concurrent access patterns.
Added SHA-256 message digest calculation during stream condensation to generate a hash of the combined data.
Added SLF4J logger to track chunk processing and output the final hash value.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(...); logger.info("Processing chunk {}", currentChunk);

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Sorted the chunks using the original comparator before processing to maintain order despite using a non-sorted queue.
Added a public clear method to explicitly reset the internal queue state.
Applied Lombok @SneakyThrows to avoid explicit try-catch blocks for checked exceptions in the condensation method.
Swapped the types of chunkIdx and startPosition to use int for the index and long for the position, likely to optimize memory usage or align with API expectations.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Changed 'long chunkIdx' to 'int chunkIdx' and 'int startPosition' to 'long startPosition'.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Added @ToString.Exclude to the data field to prevent large byte arrays from being included in the generated toString() output.
Add a chunkSize field to the EntityInfo model to support chunked data handling.
Changed the type of the 'size' field from long to int to reduce memory footprint or align with API constraints.
Added a boolean flag 'isLastChunk' to track if the current part is the final segment of a file.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions on Java 21.
Remove the unused lombok.NonNull import to clean up the codebase.
Removed the @Builder annotation to simplify object construction or resolve conflicts with other annotations.
Added @NoArgsConstructor to ensure the class can be instantiated without arguments, likely for serialization frameworks.
Removed the jobId field from the request model, shifting responsibility for ID generation elsewhere.
Removed the priority field from the request model.
Renamed chunkSize to connectionBufferSize to better reflect its purpose.
Added credId field to the Destination inner class to support credential identification.
Replaced parentInfo with fileDestinationPath in the Destination inner class to simplify path handling.
Added credId field to the Source inner class to support credential identification.
Replaced parentInfo with fileSourcePath in the Source inner class to simplify path handling.
